data.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: This app will connect to medical devices that are required by some of the tasks in the study.
data.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: This app will connect to medical devices that are required by some of the tasks in the study.
data.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera access is needed to submit photos and video in response to questions about your health and medications.
data.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: This app uses biometric authentication to log you in after your first successful login.
data.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: This is a medical research application, health data will be used to share with researchers once you have consented to participate in the study.
data.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: As part of ResearchKit, the framework might update HealthKit data while you are responding to surveys.
data.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app will use your location to allow you to respond to location questions contained in the study.
data.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app will use your location to allow you to respond to location questions contained in the study.
data.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app will use your location to allow you to respond to location questions contained in the study.
data.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: The application will use the microphone when the study you are running includes a voice task from ResearchKit.
data.NSMotionUsageDescription: ResearchKit might access motion usage to upload active task results to the Medable cloud.
data.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: The application will use the photo library so you can pick images to include them in private conversation between you, your health providers and caregivers.
data.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: This app uses speech recognition to respond to certain questions contained in the study.
